LanguageData.VFEFactory_BrewPsychiteTea.description: Brew a batch of psychite tea from psychoid leaves.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BrewPsychiteTea.label: brew a batch of psychite tea
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeMedicine.description: Make a batch of medicine from cloth, herbal medicine and neutroamine.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeMedicine.label: make batch of medicine
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RollCigar.description: Roll tobacco and gold into a cigar.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RollCigar.label: roll cigar
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RollCigarettes.label: roll cigarettes
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RollJoint.label: roll smokeleaf joints
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeAgePills.descriptio: Synthesize a batch of antibiotics from psychoid leaves and herbal medicine.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeAgePills.label: synthesize age pills
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeAntibiotics.descrip: Synthesize a batch of antibiotics from psychoid leaves and herbal medicine.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeAntibiotics.label: synthesize a batch of antibiotics
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeFlake.description: Synthesize a batch of flake from psychoid leaves.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeFlake.label: synthesize a batch of flake
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeGoJuice.description: Synthesize a batch of go-juice from neutroamine and yayo.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeGoJuice.label: synthesize a batch of go-juice
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizePenoxycyline.label: synthesize penoxycyline
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeWakeUp.description: Synthesize a batch of wake-up from neutroamine.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeWakeUp.label: synthesize a batch of wake-up
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeYayo.description: Synthesize a batch of yayo from psychoid leaves.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeYayo.label: synthesize a batch of yayo
